description: The epic high-fantasy trilogy set in Middle-earth.
Comic fantasy set on a flat world resting on the back of four elephants standing on the giant turtle Great A'Tuin.
Hari Seldon's psychohistory and the rise and fall of the Galactic Empire.
Political and ecological epic on the desert planet Arrakis.
Coming-of-age fantasy across an island archipelago.
Comedic sci-fi about Arthur Dent and the answer to life, the universe, and everything.
Bilbo Baggins's there-and-back-again adventure with the dwarves.
